results.notes: Added tribal-ETB trigger: when another Rabbit/Bat/Bird/Mouse you control enters the battlefield, emits SCRY event with amount=1. Lord static_pt_boost remains. Original 'one or more enter' batching collapsed to per-creature trigger.

Static menace grant to other Squirrels works. 'Whenever you sacrifice one or more Foods' needs Food-token tracking and a sacrifice-batched trigger; Forage activated ability needs cost-and-choice subsystem.

Static ward_1 grant to other Frogs works. ETB 'target you control can't be blocked this turn' + 'whenever that creature deals combat damage you may exile-and-return' needs targeting and a may-flicker delayed trigger.

Already wired via create_target_choice + _pileated_provisioner_execute callback. The inner etb_effect returns [] only after staging a pending_choice; effects flow from the callback handler, which emits COUNTER_ADDED (+1/+1) on the chosen non-flier.
ETB-grant-flying already wired via create_target_choice + _finch_formation_execute callback (emits GRANT_KEYWORD flying EOT). Offspring (1/1 token copy when paid) remains an engine gap.
ETB-grant-hexproof-EOT already wired via create_target_choice + _plumecreed_escort_execute callback (emits GRANT_KEYWORD hexproof EOT).

Targeting wired via create_target_choice + _driftgloom_coyote_execute. Callback emits EXILE; the 'until this leaves the battlefield' return and the conditional +1/+1 counter when exiled creature had power<=2 still rely on engine support for leaves-battlefield-tied exiles.

ETB tap-up-to-one + stun counter wired via create_target_choice + _splash_lasher_execute callback (emits TAP and COUNTER_ADDED stun). Offspring remains engine gap; stun-counter replacement of untap is engine-handled.

results.engine_gap: cost reduction by GY count + ETB-tapped-if-not-your-turn
results.notes: ETB tap-up-to-two wired via create_target_choice + _eddymurk_crab_execute callback. Cost reduction per instant/sorcery in your graveyard and conditional ETB-tapped need cost-modifier and replacement plumbing.
ETB +1/+1 EOT pump wired via create_target_choice + _intrepid_rabbit_execute callback (emits PT_MODIFICATION until end of turn). Offspring remains engine gap.

Static prowess grant to other creatures works. The 'whenever you cast a noncreature spell, target you control can't be blocked this turn' trigger needs spell-cast trigger + target choice + UEOT unblockable.
Already implemented as DAMAGE TRANSFORM interceptor: when a Lizard/Mouse/Otter/Raccoon you control deals damage, amount += 1. No empty trigger to fill.
Already simplified to static +1/+1 on all controlled creatures (default fallback for chosen-type). Tap-for-mana ability remains engine gap.

results.engine_gap: delayed return-with-flying-counter at next end step
results.notes: Bird-ETB filter + create_target_choice + _salvation_swan_execute callback wired. Callback emits EXILE; the delayed 'return at next end step with a flying counter' needs DELAYED_TRIGGER scheduling.

results.engine_gap: flood-counter creation + type-grant + first-spell cost reduction
results.notes: P/T = number of Islands wired via QUERY_POWER/QUERY_TOUGHNESS handlers. The 'enters or attacks: flood counter on target land; that land becomes Island' trigger needs targeting + custom counter type + type-grant. Cost reduction needs a once-per-turn cost-modifier.
Already implemented as QUERY_TOUGHNESS handler that overrides opponent creatures' base toughness to 1. Ward—Discard requires alternative-cost ward variant.
Already implemented as QUERY_POWER handler (+1 per other Rat). Threshold + may-pay {2}{B} + return-tapped-and-attacking from graveyard needs reanimation pipeline + cost choice.
Already implemented via QUERY_POWER (+2 if you control a token) and QUERY_ABILITIES (grant trample if you control a token). No empty trigger to fill.

L1 ETB 'target you control deals damage = its power to target opponent's creature' needs dual-target + bite handler. L2 attack pump + trample EOT and L3 end-step draw-on-power-4 also remain engine gaps (Class subsystem).
Already implemented via QUERY_POWER and QUERY_TOUGHNESS handlers (P/T = number of creatures you control). No empty trigger to fill.

results.engine_gap: interactive targeting with mana-value comparator + Frog mana-ability grant
results.notes: ETB filter for self-or-other-creature wired. 'Return up to one target creature you control with lesser mana value' needs MV comparator on legal targets + bounce. Frog 'T: G or U for creature spells' grant needs activated-ability-grant subsystem.
Threshold +3/+0 already implemented via QUERY_POWER conditional on graveyard size >= 7. The {2}{U/B}: Surveil 1 activated ability needs activated-ability registration.

results.engine_gap: Gift mechanic + conditional auto-attach + equipped P/T loses-flying
results.notes: ETB 'if gift was promised, attach to target you control' needs gift tracking + auto-attach. The static +3/+3 and 'loses flying' on equipped creature needs equipment subsystem.
Targeting wired via create_target_choice + _banishing_light_execute callback (emits EXILE). The 'until this enchantment leaves' return relies on engine support for leaves-battlefield-tied exiles.

Modal choice wired via create_modal_choice + _downwind_ambusher_mode_handler. Mode 0 (-1/-1 EOT) and Mode 1 (destroy damaged) flow through their respective execute callbacks emitting PT_MODIFICATION or OBJECT_DESTROYED.

Modal choice wired via create_modal_choice + _hivespine_wolverine_mode_handler. Modes flow through _hivespine_counter_execute (COUNTER_ADDED), _hivespine_fight_execute (FIGHT) and _hivespine_destroy_execute (OBJECT_DESTROYED) callbacks.
